Back to Home

Desert Caravan Runner

Guide a camel caravan across desert dunes and mountain passes. Collect cultural symbols, books, instruments, and handicrafts while avoiding storm obstacles.

Caravan Trail

Use the Up/Down arrow keys or the buttons below to move the caravan.

0 Score 3 Health 1 Speed

Collectibles

  • 📜 Cultural Symbols
  • 📚 Books
  • 🎻 Instruments
  • 🧵 Handicrafts

Obstacles

  • ⛈️ Storm Clouds

Avoid storms to keep the caravan healthy. Each storm hit reduces health by one. Reach the end of the trail for a cultural voyage reward.

Share Your Journey

Tell us what cultural treasures you collected along the caravan route.

Contribute a Story

Explore More

Try other interactive cultural missions.

Gulzameen (Balochistan)

A living digital ecosystem celebrating the rich cultural heritage of Balochistan.
